featureName: Lot Wizard — Server Component Refactoring + Independent Mode E2E
description: Refactor the lot creation wizard (2872-line monolithic Client Component) to follow Next.js/React/Supabase best practices: Server Component wrapper with getServerAuthContext(), remove useTeamStatus/useAuth/TeamCheckModal, add data-testid attributes, and enable full E2E testing including independent mode.

userStories.title: Create Server Component page.tsx for lot wizard
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a thin Server Component wrapper (like the building wizard) that handles auth + data loading server-side, so the client form never needs useTeamStatus/useAuth.
acceptanceCriteria: New page.tsx uses getServerAuthContext('gestionnaire')
Team managers loaded server-side (same pattern as immeubles/nouveau/page.tsx)
Category counts loaded server-side
searchParams.buildingId passed as prop for pre-fill
Imports and renders LotCreationForm client component
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created 75-line Server Component mirroring immeubles/nouveau/page.tsx. Added searchParams.buildingId prop for pre-fill. Lint clean.

userStories.title: Refactor page.tsx → lot-creation-form.tsx (client component)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the existing lot wizard page renamed and cleaned up: remove useAuth, useTeamStatus, TeamCheckModal, isMounted, and all client-side data loading effects — replace with props from the Server Component.
acceptanceCriteria: File renamed from page.tsx to lot-creation-form.tsx
Props interface added (userProfile, userTeam, allTeams, initialTeamManagers, initialCategoryCounts, prefillBuildingId)
useAuth() removed — replaced with userProfile prop
useTeamStatus() removed entirely
TeamCheckModal import and early return (line 879) removed
isMounted state + useEffect removed
loadUserTeamAndManagers effect (lines 368-467) removed — initialized from props
loadCategoryCountsByTeam effect (lines 469-500) removed — initialized from props
useSearchParams().get('buildingId') replaced with prefillBuildingId prop
loading.tsx deleted (no longer needed)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 2872→2711 lines (-161). Removed useAuth, useTeamStatus, TeamCheckModal, isMounted, 2 data-loading effects, lazy service init. All replaced by 6 props from Server Component. Deleted loading.tsx. Lint clean.

userStories.title: Add data-testid to radio buttons + verify wizard works
userStories.description: As a test author, I want data-testid attributes on the step 1 radio buttons so E2E tests can reliably select building association modes.
acceptanceCriteria: data-testid='radio-existing' on the existing building radio div
data-testid='radio-new' on the new building radio div
data-testid='radio-independent' on the independent radio div
Radio switching works without TeamCheckModal flash (manual verify or E2E)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added 3 data-testid attributes to radio divs in lot-creation-form.tsx. TeamCheckModal is fully removed so no flash possible.

userStories.title: E2E test: Lot wizard existing building mode (7 tests)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the existing 7 E2E tests for the lot wizard (existing building flow) to pass after the refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 existing tests pass: load step 1, select building, navigate steps 2-5, back navigation
Tests pass in 2 consecutive runs (no flakiness)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Fixed 4 remaining bare `user` references → `userProfile`. All 7 tests pass in 2 consecutive runs (0 flakiness).

userStories.title: E2E test: Lot wizard independent mode
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests that validate the independent lot creation flow: selecting independent mode, navigating all 5 steps, and verifying state preservation on back navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: POM updated with selectIndependentMode() method using data-testid
New describe block with 3+ tests for independent mode
Test 1: select independent mode on step 1 — wizard stays visible, Next enabled
Test 2: navigate through all 5 steps in independent mode
Test 3: navigate back to step 1 with state preserved
All tests pass in 2 consecutive runs
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added selectIndependentMode() + fillIndependentLotAddress() to POM. 3 new tests (10 total). Key fixes: click label[for=independent] for Radix, navigate via dashboard to clear Next.js client cache, page.evaluate clicks for hydration safety. 3 consecutive runs pass.

userStories.title: Extend POM with submission methods
userStories.description: As a test author, I want clickSubmit(), waitForSuccessToast(), and waitForRedirect() methods in the POM so E2E tests can verify real form submission.
acceptanceCriteria: clickSubmit() method clicks wizard-submit-btn on step 5
waitForSuccessToast(timeout) waits for 'créé avec succès' text in DOM
waitForRedirect(urlPart, timeout) polls URL for client-side navigation
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added 3 methods to POM: clickSubmit (waits for selector + clicks), waitForSuccessToast (polls DOM text), waitForRedirect (polls URL for client-side nav). Lint clean.

userStories.title: E2E: Submit and create lots in DB (both modes)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests that actually submit the lot wizard form and verify real data creation in staging DB — toast message + redirect URL for both existing building and independent modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Test 1: existing building mode — submit creates lot, toast 'créé avec succès', redirect to /gestionnaire/biens/immeubles/{id}
Test 2: independent mode — submit creates lot, toast 'créé avec succès', redirect to /gestionnaire/biens
Both tests pass in 2 consecutive runs (no flakiness)
All 12 tests pass (10 navigation + 2 submission)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Added 2 submission tests (existing building + independent). Key: waitForNextEnabled(15_000) before every clickNext() prevents auto-init useEffect race. Also added submission test to building-creation.e2e.ts (bonus). 2 consecutive runs pass (12/12), 0 flakiness.
